data.title: Focus on the Match, Not the Score.
data.subtitle: The ultimate scoring app for Padel, Tennis, and Pickleball. Track every point on your phone or watch, analyze your stats, and share your victories.

data.title: Everything You Need to Win
data.subtitle: Powerful features designed for competitive players
data.card1Body: Seamlessly sync your matches across iPhone, Apple Watch, Android phones, and Wear OS watches.
data.card2Body: Intuitive tap-to-score interface designed for mid-game use. Track points, games, and sets with a glance.
data.card3Body: Let the app call the score so you never lose focus on the ball. Customizable voice settings for any environment.

data.title: Score Like a Pro, On Any Device
data.body: Whether you prefer our revolutionary player-drag 'Baller Mode' on your phone or simple taps on your watch, scoring has never been faster. Spend less time on your device and more time in the game.
data.imageAlt: Baller Score on iPhone and Apple Watch

data.title: Real-Time Live Dashboard
data.subtitle: Share the action as it happens
data.body: Generate a unique QR code or shareable link for any match. Friends, family, and fans can watch your score update live from anywhere in the world — no app required for viewers.
data.bullets:
Live score updates
Match statistics
Shareable links
No app needed for viewers

data.title: Deep Analytics
data.subtitle: Know your game inside and out
data.body: Track your performance over time with comprehensive statistics. Win/loss ratios, point distributions, and trends help you identify strengths and areas for improvement.

data.title: Play Everywhere.
data.subtitle: Available on iOS, Android, watchOS, and Wear OS.

data.title: What Players Say
data.subtitle: Join thousands of happy players
data.t1Quote: Baller Score has completely changed how I track my matches. The watch app is incredibly convenient during intense rallies.
data.t2Quote: The live dashboard feature is a game-changer. My family can follow my tournament matches in real-time from another country!
data.t3Quote: Finally, an app that understands racket sport scoring. The stats help me analyze my game and improve week over week.

data.title: Ready to Elevate Your Game?
data.subtitle: Download Baller Score now and never lose track of a point again.
